exploration_notes: The MIR borrow check pipeline: (1) Entry point: `mir_borrowck` in `lib.rs:117` creates a `BorrowCheckRootCtxt` and calls `do_mir_borrowck` in `root_cx.rs:242`, which iterates all nested bodies and collects region constraints. (2) Place conflict detection: `places_conflict.rs` implements `places_conflict` (line 81) and `borrow_conflicts_with_place` (line 104), which walk borrow/access place projections in lockstep to determine overlap/disjointness. These are called from `access_place` in `lib.rs:
